{{Infobox concept
| name = Arelius bloodline
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Arelius bloodline is an ancient and legendary lineage characterized by a unique sensory legacy. Unlike those who rely on spiritual perception, members of this family perceive the world through physical senses such as sight, hearing, and smell. This ability allows them to see objects—such as marble—as if they were clear glass, though the contents within may remain invisible. This bloodline gift provides them with exceptional coordination and reaction speeds, making them difficult opponents to target in combat. The family, known as [[House Arelius]], is represented by a white crescent moon symbol and uses dark blue, black, and white as its colors. Historically, the clan was a massive power with holdings across multiple continents and once included a [[Monarch]]. Notable figures in their history include [[Ozmanthus Arelius]], an acclaimed [[Soulsmith]] whose crest became the family symbol, and [[Tiberian Arelius]], a former Patriarch known as the [[Storm King]] who ruled over half of the [[Rosegold continent]] and maintained peace with [[House Shen]]. In more recent times, the family has faced periods of instability and near destruction, though they continue to operate through various branches, such as the [[Blackflame]] branch. Key members include [[Eithan]] Arelius, an [[Underlord]] who has mentored individuals like [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]]; [[Gaien Arelius]], the current Patriarch; and [[Cassias Arelius]], the heir to the [[Blackflame]] branch. The family's influence remains significant in political and martial circles, often involving complex relationships with other great clans and imperial representatives.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Arelius bloodline]] possesses legendary power.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The girl will gain a measure of the [[Arelius bloodline]] ability.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]] Arelius possesses the legendary [[Arelius bloodline legacy]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Cassias]]'s bloodline radiates strands of power.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Arelius bloodline]] has an impressive reaction speed and coordination gift.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
